item.title: Delta Goodrem announced as Australia’s representative for the 70th Eurovision Song Contest
item.description: ‘I am so honoured to be representing Australia on one of the biggest music stages in the world.’

item.title: Australian billionaire Adrian Portelli reports feeling safer surrounded by missile threats in Dubai than Melbourne
item.description: The high-profile entrepreneur said he’s more worried about food stains than missiles.

item.title: Legendary jockey Pat Hyland dies surrounded by family: ‘Deeply loved to the end’
item.description: The champion became an icon when he achieved one of Australian racing’s most famous feats in front of Prince Charles and Princess Diana.

item.title: Mike Smithson: Inside the escalating fight for SA’s undecided voters ahead of election
item.description: There is only 18 days left to campaign for the 2026 SA election as regional seats take a key focus.

item.title: ATP Challenger tennis players race off court at Fujairah Open after nearby explosions: ‘Get inside’
item.description: Players ‘heard the sounds of jets’ and quickly realised it was ‘not very safe’, as officials plotted escape routes out of the country.

item.title: Aussie heavyweight Justis Huni announces boxing comeback after tragic death of trainer Keri Fui
item.description: The 26-year-old has been sidelined since his trainer suffered a heart attack during their workout and later died.

item.title: Ukrainian Igor Komarav reportedly killed after alleged kidnapping in Bali as dismembered remains found
item.description: The 28-year-old was holidaying with his girlfriend when he was allegedly snatched off the street.

item.title: Former world No.1 Jon Rahm levels damning ‘extortion’ accusation at European Tour
item.description: The two-time major champion has put forward a compromise but the fight looks set to rumble on.

item.title: Small business owners worry work-from-home laws will ‘create divide’ between workers
item.description: ‘Admin staff have the ... right to work from home but the blue-collar workers will have to come in.’

item.title: Labor maintains strong lead as One Nation surges in latest SA polling numbers
item.description: The Roy Morgan poll shows that South Australians are set to re-elect Premier Peter Malinauskas and the Labor Government with an increased majority.

item.title: ‘Time is up’: Mounting calls for Medicare rebate to cover longer GP visits which are ‘essential’ for complex care
item.description: Peak health bodies believe the current rebate system unfairly punishes patients with complex needs.

item.description: ‘I’ve lost something very precious.’

item.title: Wedding bells ring for Australian favourites Noemie Fox and tennis champion Aryna Sabalenka
item.description: The ‘magical’ scenes have given sporting legends from the around the world ‘goosebumps’.

item.title: Age restrictions loom as e-bike and e-scooter safety recommendations handed down to Queensland government
item.description: Children under 16 are the main target of recommended reforms.

item.description: Our expert commentators and award-winning journos are dropping bombs ahead of the AFL season.

item.title: Outback floods: Inland sea cuts off communities as floodwaters cover large parts of central west Queensland
item.description: ‘Road access in and out of these communities is going to take some time to be restored.’

item.title: Coalition not scrapping $10k tradie bonus scheme, despite it being ‘inflationary’ and not ‘the answer’
item.description: This is despite the Shadow Minister for Skills calling the scheme ‘inflationary’, ‘wrong’ and ‘not the answer’.

item.title: ‘Put One Nation first’: Pauline Hanson’s party refuses to direct preferences in South Australia election
item.description: The party is projected to win at least one upper house seat in the March election.

item.title: Donald Trump fires Kristi Noem as homeland security secretary following drama-filled immigration crackdown
item.description: A White House official said the dumping was the result of ‘many unfortunate leadership failures’.

item.title: Sam Kerr makes huge Mary Fowler prediction after drought-breaking Matildas goal against Iran
item.description: ‘She has got age on her side.’

item.description: A journalist has sounded the alarm and says the team is facing ‘arbitrary detention and execution’.

item.description: The popular presenter has been on leave since her 84-year-old mother disappeared in a suspected kidnapping.

item.description: Here’s what we know about the inquiry.

item.description: The men are suspected of spying on locations and individuals.

item.description: The toys were sold nationally, internationally, and online.

item.description: The New Zealander has been under intense scrutiny but the board is backing their man.

item.description: Chocolate lovers are paying more than ever for Lindt bunnies, Cadbury eggs and other Easter favourites.

item.description: Travellers stranded by the Israel-Iran conflict may be transported to cities with open airports.

item.description: Caveats have been secured over a number of properties linked to notorious politician Eddie Obeid.

item.description: ‘I’m confident we have selected the right candidate for this critical by-election.’

item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Iran, Israel and US war live updates: US President Donald Trump says five Iranian National Women’s Soccer Team players reportedly granted asylum in Australia
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Lotus Eletre X plug-in hybrid heading to the UK, but Australia yet to be confirmed
item.description: The Lotus Eletre plug-in hybrid is heading for Europe and the UK later this year, but Australian availability is still unclear.

item.title: Police announce $250,000 reward for information leading to arrest of alleged murderer Julian Ingram
item.description: Ingram remains missing after being accused of killing three people, including his pregnant ex, earlier this year.

item.title: ‘Scared’ Aussie gold medallist Michael Milton savages own ‘pathetic’ performance in Paralympics comeback
item.description: The inspirational veteran choked back tears after making it to the start line just days after surgery for a broken leg.

item.title: Aussie baseball manager devastated after dramatic exit from World Baseball Classic: ‘We failed’
item.description: Australia’s epic run has come to an end after conceding a tiebreaking run at the last possible moment.

item.title: ‘Worst case scenario’: Donald Trump warning over Iran’s new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei
item.description: Alarm bells are ringing over the hardline conservative son of the slain Ayatollah.

item.title: Man found dead in Waterford West as police question second man, declare multiple crime scenes
item.description: A second crime scene was declared about four kilometres from where the man was found.

item.title: Jury out on Josh Weddle midfield move in Will Day absence after Hawthorn smashed by GWS
item.description: The success of the Hawks’ new ‘experiment’ is ‘still pending’.

item.title: ‘Emotional’ Carlton blacklist Sam Docherty for weeks as Michael Voss draws line in the sand, Dan Gorringe takes blame
item.description: ‘This is incredible for a guy who fought cancer twice while playing with them.’

item.title: Car continues on just three tyres and a rim after crashing during police chase from Marrickville to Sydney’s CBD and back
item.description: Officers had spotted the vehicle driving without headlights on a Sydney road.

item.title: Kyle Sandilands opens up on Jackie O feud during Australian Idol
item.description: The off-air radio icon let down his guard in a rare public display of emotion.
